entries.title: Git Branch Age Inspector
entries.notes: Parses git metadata from the active repo to surface branches older than a configurable threshold. Simple DOM parsing of GitHub/GitLab UI plus local git commands. Uniqueness lies in the time-decay angle most tools ignore.
entries.pain: Developers lose track of stale branches and waste time rebasing or reviewing outdated code.

entries.title: Pipeline Velocity Tracker
entries.notes: Scrapes Salesforce/HubSpot deal stage timestamps and renders a velocity chart in a sidebar. Freemium tier shows last 30 days; pro unlocks quarterly trends. Differentiator: movement speed, not just stage.
entries.pain: Sales reps manually calculate deal movement speed and miss early signals of stalled opportunities.

entries.title: Email Thread Sentiment Drift
entries.notes: Runs lightweight sentiment analysis on each Gmail message in a thread and plots a drift line. Uses a free-tier LLM API. Gap: no tool shows emotional trajectory over time within threads.
entries.pain: Salespeople miss emotional tone shifts in long email threads and respond too late to salvage deals.

entries.title: Webhook Retry Budget Tracker
entries.notes: Intercepts outgoing webhook headers and maintains a live counter badge. Configurable per-endpoint budgets. Lightweight storage in extension localStorage. Differentiator: budget-aware, not just retry-aware.
entries.pain: Developers exceed webhook retry budgets unexpectedly and lose events without knowing until customers complain.

entries.title: Calendar Buffer Suggestion Engine
entries.notes: Analyzes Google Calendar gaps and suggests micro-breaks or focus blocks using a simple rule engine. Uses free/busy API. Unique angle: buffer sizing based on meeting type, not fixed duration.
entries.pain: Professionals schedule back-to-back meetings and lose focus time they did not realize they needed.

entries.title: CSS Specificity War Visualizer
entries.notes: Highlights conflicting CSS rules in DevTools Elements panel with live specificity scores. Uses parsed CSSOM. Niche angle: war visualization showing which rule dominates.
entries.pain: Frontend developers debug specificity conflicts by manually calculating scores and still misjudge winners.

entries.title: Third-Party Script Load Cost Overlay
entries.notes: Aggregates Network panel timing data for third-party origins and renders a per-domain cost breakdown. Tip jar model because power users care. Gap: no consumer-facing load cost visualization exists.
entries.pain: Users do not know which third-party scripts drain their bandwidth and battery the most during browsing.

entries.title: Competitor Job Posting Trend Scanner
entries.notes: Scrapes LinkedIn job postings for competitor company names and shows posting velocity over time. Freemium limits to 3 companies. Unique angle: hiring velocity as a sales signal.
entries.pain: Revenue teams do not know when competitors are scaling or cutting teams, missing early market signals.

entries.title: GitHub Star History Visualizer
entries.notes: Fetches star event timeline from GitHub API and renders a momentum chart. Uses public API with minimal auth. Niche: momentum over raw count, differentiating fast-rising vs legacy repos.
entries.pain: Developers evaluate open-source projects without seeing momentum and misjudge repo health by raw star counts.

entries.title: Browser Extension Permission Risk Score
entries.notes: Parses installed extension manifests and scores risk based on permission scope (tabs, cookies, scripting). Shows a risk dashboard. Gap: no consumer tool surfaces extension permission cost.
entries.pain: Users install many Chrome extensions without understanding what data each one can access on every page.

entries.title: Meeting Transcript Action Item Splitter
entries.notes: Uses LLM to parse Google Meet transcripts and extract owner-assigned tasks with due dates. Freemium allows 5 extractions/month. Differentiator: action item extraction, not full summarization.
entries.pain: Account executives lose action items in long meeting transcripts and miss follow-up commitments that close deals.

entries.title: Local LLM Response Cache
entries.notes: Hashes prompts and caches responses locally. Shows cache hit rate in popup. Works with any LLM API endpoint via declarativeNetRequest rules. Unique angle: prompt-level deduplication without server-side storage.
entries.pain: Users re-prompt AI assistants with near-identical queries and waste API quota on repeated responses.

entries.title: Code Review Comment Recurrence Detector
entries.notes: Analyzes GitHub PR comment history and clusters repeated phrases. Surfaces reusable snippets. Lightweight semantic similarity using embeddings API. Gap: comment recurrence is a known pain, no tool surfaces it.
entries.pain: Senior developers repeat the same review feedback across PRs without a reusable snippet system.

entries.title: GCP Resource Tag Compliance Checker
entries.notes: Queries GCP Resource Manager API from the browser and flags untagged or mis-tagged resources per project. Per-seat B2B model targeting cloud finance teams. Differentiator: browser-native tag compliance, not CLI-only.
entries.pain: DevOps teams accrue untagged GCP resources and face surprise billing during end-of-month reviews.

entries.title: Readability Score By Section
entries.notes: Highlights article sections by Flesch-Kincaid grade level and color-codes difficulty. Helps readers decide where to skim. Tip jar model. Unique angle: per-section scoring, not whole-page averages.
entries.pain: Readers struggle with long-form articles where sections vary wildly in complexity and effort to parse.
